headline: BASFY Adds ReducedPCF TPU Solution to Reduce Carbon Footprint
summary: BASF launches ReducedPCF Elastollan TPU grades in Asia Pacific, offering up to 30% lower carbon footprint without sacrificing performance.

raw.headline: BASFY Adds ReducedPCF TPU Solution to Reduce Carbon Footprint
raw.summary: BASF launches ReducedPCF Elastollan TPU grades in Asia Pacific, offering up to 30% lower carbon footprint without sacrificing performance.

headline: PPG Launches SEM Automotive Refinish Products in Mexico
summary: PPG launches the SEM brand in Mexico, bringing automotive refinish solutions aimed at boosting repair quality, efficiency and reducing material waste.

raw.headline: PPG Launches SEM Automotive Refinish Products in Mexico
raw.summary: PPG launches the SEM brand in Mexico, bringing automotive refinish solutions aimed at boosting repair quality, efficiency and reducing material waste.

headline: Agnico Eagle Expands Wallbridge Stake Through C$22.4M Investment
summary: AEM will invest C$22.4M in Wallbridge, lifting its stake to about 19.9% and supporting the Fenelon gold project in Quebec.

raw.headline: Agnico Eagle Expands Wallbridge Stake Through C$22.4M Investment
